title: Apply logo color theme and use uploaded service images in service section

requirements.text: Generate polished service card banner images for each service category using the uploaded service images (Mini Readings, Love & Relationship Readings, Career/Money/Life, Deep & Detailed Readings, Premium/Exclusive) and incorporate logo elements (blue crescent moon, crystals, sparkle stars, botanical leaves) as decorative overlays to beautify each card. Save them as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/ and display them in the Services section as the visual header/illustration for each service package card.

quotes: use given service images to post in service section
use the given logo of blue color with crystal and moon to beautify the service section pic

acceptanceCriteria: Each service category card in the Services section displays its corresponding uploaded service image enhanced with logo-themed decorative elements
Service images are visually consistent with the blue crystal-moon logo aesthetic

requirements.text: Retheme the entire website to match the logo's color palette: primary steel blue (#2b7ab5 / similar), cream/off-white background (#f5f0ea), soft peach/rose accent for sparkles, and deep navy for text. Update all CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css, Tailwind config tokens (mystic colors), gradient backgrounds in App.tsx, Hero, Header, Services, About, Footer, ProductCatalog, Reviews, and all other section components to reflect this blue-crystal-moon color scheme consistently throughout.

quotes: turn the whole website into my logo theme

acceptanceCriteria: Primary color across the site is the logo's steel blue
Background uses the creamy off-white from the logo background
Accent sparkle/highlight color reflects the peach-rose tones from logo stars
All buttons, headings, cards, badges, and section backgrounds use the updated logo-consistent palette
No legacy purple or dark theme colors remain as primary UI elements

requirements.text: Update the ServicesGallery component (frontend/src/components/ServicesGallery.tsx) and serviceGalleryImages data (frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.ts) to use the newly generated service category images from frontend/public/assets/generated/ instead of placeholder paths, mapping each image to its correct service category label.

quotes: use given service images to post in service section

acceptanceCriteria: ServicesGallery grid shows the real uploaded/generated service images
Each gallery item has the correct category label (Mini Readings, Love & Relationship, Career/Money/Life, Deep & Detailed, Premium/Exclusive)
No broken image links in the gallery

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not alter the backend data model or Motoko actor
All generated images must be placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
nonGoals: Changing service pricing data or backend service records
Adding new service categories beyond what exists
Redesigning the overall page layout or section structure

required: Service card banner for Mini Readings — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-mini-readings-banner.dim_800x500.png)

Service card banner for Love & Relationship Readings — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and rose-pink accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-love-relationship-banner.dim_800x500.png)

Service card banner for Career / Money / Life — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and amber accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-career-money-life-banner.dim_800x500.png)

Service card banner for Deep & Detailed Readings — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and golden accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-deep-detailed-banner.dim_800x500.png)

Service card banner for Premium / Exclusive — blue crescent moon and crystal cluster illustration with sparkle stars and flame-orange accent on a cream background, pentacle hand motif in the corner, blue line-art style (service-premium-exclusive-banner.dim_800x500.png)
